_note: Test-only defaults loaded when ASPNETCORE_ENVIRONMENT=Testing (set by WebApplicationFactory). These values satisfy the DataAnnotation validators on RedisOptions / RabbitMqOptions / MlServiceOptions so the Test host starts, but no real infrastructure is contacted — tests that talk to Redis/Rabbit/ML either mock those dependencies or skip. The DB connection string is overridden per-test via AddInMemoryCollection so it points at the Docker Postgres. Checked in to the repo on purpose: everything here is non-secret.
